calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-03-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Paul N. Andonian, Esq., appearing through CourtCall for Plaintiff, LEAF CAPITAL FUNDING, LLC, a limited liability company,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant PRISTINE SUN, LLC, A WYOMING LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $84,492.03
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $2825.00
Costs: $894.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $88,211.03

Judgment includes immediate possession of items for collateral:
1. Twelve Lenovo W550s Laptop computers with Windows 7 Pro 64 bit;
2. Ten Acer Aspire XC-603 Computers;
3. Ten ViewSonic VX225MH Computer Monitors;
4. One Lenovo ThinkCentre M93p 10A7 Computer;
5. One Crucial DDR3 8GB RAM Chip;
6. All parts, accessories, accessions and attachments relating to the above collateral, and all replacements substitions and exchanges (including trade-ins) relating to the above collateral.

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-01-2017 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-22-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2017 Continued To May-17-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order
Off Calendar Jan-23-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Paul N. Andonian of the law offices of Hemar Rousso & Heald LLP (818.501.3800 ext. 113) appears via telephone as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Leaf Capital Funding, LLC's application for writ of attachment as to defendant Pristine Sun, LLC is off calendar. On January 5, 2017 the default of Pristine Sun was entered, thereby mooting this application.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: not reported. (D302)

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order
Off Calendar Nov-21-2016 Continued To Jan-23-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Andonian of Hemar Rousso & Heald, LLP telephone number 818-501-3800 for Plaintiff Leaf Capital Funding.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Mr. Andonian stated that no proof of service has been filed and requested a continuance to serve this matter along with the summons and complaint. The Court vacated its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF LEAF CAPITAL FUNDING, LLC'S Application For Right To Attach Order is continued to January 23, 2017 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302. The papers must include a notice of the January 23rd hearing.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
